listing.title: Shared furnished room with own bathroom in a trailer | Olds, Alberta T4H 1M2 | I have 2 bedrooms to rent ,price listed is for one room. 1 room has new single bed,dresser,large clo...
listing.description:
I have 2 bedrooms to rent ,price listed is for one room. 1 room has new single bed,dresser,large closet,shelving storage, Other bedroom has queen bed,dresser,nightstand,large closet.Bedrooms have same bathroom to share, Shared laundry,kitchen,& living room. No pets,smoking/waping or drugs.References Please! Groceries & personal hygiene products will be renter`s responsibility. Utilities & internet included in rent.

Retired male resident/home owner in residence….. Secure,clean ,tidy home for your comfort!

To message Cal or view their phone number you need to be a member. Joining and communicating is free.

Clean,tidy ,secure home with access to laundry,kitchen,and living room areas. Located in quiet mobile park area,close to shopping options.

Room near: Doan, Red Deer County, AB, Bowden, AB, Didsbury, AB, Minaret, Didsbury, AB & Mountain View County, AB.

---
Listing details (user-provided):
- Rent: CAD 575/month
- Bedrooms: 2
- Bathrooms: 1
- Location: Doan, Red Deer County

recommendedActions: Gather more info: ask for a live video tour, exact address, and a standard lease.
Compare the rent to similar listings in the neighborhood.
redundancySteps: Do an in-person viewing (or live video tour) before sending any money.
Ask for the landlord/agent’s full name and verify ownership (land registry / property manager website).
Reverse-image search 2–3 listing photos to spot duplicates across cities.
Compare rent vs nearby similar units (same beds/baths) to detect bait pricing.
Never pay via e-Transfer, crypto, gift cards, or cash before the lease is signed and keys are verified.
If you have a lease draft, run it through the Lease Simplifier to flag predatory clauses.
